This product idea presents a fascinating blend of crafting, exploration, and racing. The unique clockwork world and the promise of discovering legendary artifacts with game-altering abilities certainly capture attention. However, the core appeal for me hinges on the execution of these intricate systems and how seamlessly they integrate into the racing experience. The concept itself is intriguing enough to warrant further investigation.
